name: Gmail
description: Search, read, send emails and manage drafts via Gmail API

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Redirect URI must be set to: https://YOUR-N8N-URL/webhook/oauth-callback

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: From the same OAuth 2.0 Client ID page in Google Cloud Console

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails using Gmail search syntax. Parameters: query (Gmail search query, required), max_results (number, default 10)

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read a specific email by ID. Parameters: message_id (required)

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email. Parameters: to (required), subject (required), body (required), cc (optional), bcc (optional)

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create an email draft. Parameters: to (required), subject (required), body (required)

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all Gmail labels. No parameters required.

author: freddy-schuetz
